parameters.query:
-- :tenant_id    = owner's tenant UUID
-- :amount_naira = exact amount transferred (e.g. 4589)
-- :payment_ref  = receipt reference or description

UPDATE table_1
column_1 balance + :amount_naira,
    updated_at = now()
column_2 :tenant_id
RETURNING tenant_id, balance AS new_balance;

INSERT INTO table_2
  (tenant_id, action_type, credits_used, metadata)
VALUES (
  :tenant_id,
  'topup',
  -:amount_naira,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'amount_naira', :amount_naira,
    'reference',    :payment_ref,
    'topped_up_by', 'admin'
  )
);

parameters.query:
SELECT
  co.customer_chat_id,
  co.order_number,
  co.business_id,
  co.payment_bank_name,
  co.payment_acct_no,
  co.payment_acct_name,
  cu.platform,
  pi_wa.access_token AS wa_instance
FROM table_3 co
LEFT JOIN table_5 cu
  ON cu.business_id = co.business_id
  AND cu.platform_id = co.customer_chat_id
LEFT JOIN table_6 pi_wa
  ON pi_wa.business_id = co.business_id
  AND pi_wa.platform = 'whatsapp'
  AND pi_wa.is_active = true
WHERE co.order_number = $1
  AND co.business_id = $2::uuid
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO table_7 (session_id, message)
VALUES 
  ($1, $2::jsonb),
  ($1, $3::jsonb)

parameters.query:
UPDATE table_3
column_4 (
      SELECT payment_bank_name FROM table_3
      column_5 $3::uuid
        AND payment_bank_name IS NOT NULL
        column_6= 'appointment'
      ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    payment_acct_no = (
      SELECT payment_acct_no FROM table_3
      column_5 $3::uuid
        AND payment_bank_name IS NOT NULL
        column_6= 'appointment'
      ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    payment_acct_name = (
      SELECT payment_acct_name FROM table_3
      column_5 $3::uuid
        AND payment_bank_name IS NOT NULL
        column_6= 'appointment'
      ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    status           = 'confirmed',
    confirm_token    = NULL,
    token_expires_at = NULL,
    updated_at       = now()
column_2 $1::uuid
  column_3 $2
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id,
          payment_bank_name, payment_acct_no, payment_acct_name

parameters.query:
SELECT payment_bank_name, payment_acct_no, payment_acct_name
FROM table_3
column_5 $1::uuid
  AND payment_bank_name IS NOT NULL
  AND payment_acct_no IS NOT NULL
  column_6= 'appointment'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO table_8 (tenant_id, business_id, key, value, source)
SELECT
  e.tenant_id,
  e.business_id,
  'faq_' || LEFT(LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.question_text, '[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]', '', 'g')), 30) AS key,
  e.owner_reply,
  'escalation_answer'
FROM table_9 e
WHERE e.id = $1::uuid
  AND e.status = 'replied'
ON CONFLICT (business_id, key)
DO UPDATE column_7 EXCLUDED.value,
  updated_at = now(),
  is_active  = true
RETURNING key, value

WITH reply AS (
  UPDATE table_9
  column_8 $3,
    status       = 'replied',
    replied_at   = now()
  column_9 $2::uuid
    column_10 'pending'
  RETURNING id, customer_chat_id, customer_platform, question_text, tenant_id, business_id
),
cleanup AS (
  DELETE FROM table_10
  column_11 $2::uuid
)
SELECT * FROM table_11;

SELECT 
  s.id AS session_id,
  s.escalation_id,
  s.expires_at,
  s.business_id,
  e.customer_chat_id,
  e.customer_platform,
  e.question_text,
  e.tenant_id,
  pi.access_token AS customer_bot_token
FROM table_10 s
JOIN table_9 e ON e.id = s.escalation_id
JOIN table_6 pi 
  ON pi.business_id = s.business_id 
  AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE s.owner_chat_id = $1
  AND s.business_id   = $2::uuid
  AND s.expires_at    > now()
  AND e.status        = 'pending'
LIMIT 1

UPDATE table_9
column_10 'expired',
    replied_at = now()
column_9 $1::uuid
  column_10 'pending'
RETURNING id;

parameters.query:
-- Mark the escalation as in-progress and create a session
-- so the owner's next message is captured as the reply
INSERT INTO table_10 (
  tenant_id, business_id, owner_chat_id, escalation_id, expires_at
)
SELECT
  e.tenant_id,
  e.business_id,
  $2,
  e.id,
  now() + INTERVAL '10 minutes'
FROM table_9 e
WHERE e.id = $1::uuid
  AND e.status = 'pending'
ON CONFLICT (owner_chat_id, business_id)
DO UPDATE column_11 EXCLUDED.escalation_id,
  expires_at    = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
  created_at    = now()
RETURNING id, escalation_id;

SELECT 
  t.telegram_id,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token,
  b.id AS business_id,
  b.business_name
FROM table_12 t
JOIN table_13 b 
  ON b.id = $2::uuid
JOIN table_6 pi 
  ON pi.business_id = b.id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE t.id = $1::uuid

UPDATE table_3
column_12 encode(gen_random_bytes(16), 'hex'),
    token_expires_at = now() + interval '30 minutes',
    updated_at       = now()
column_2 $1::uuid
  column_3 $2
  AND status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'pending')
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id, confirm_token,
          items, total_amount, delivery_type, delivery_address

UPDATE table_3
column_10 'cancelled',
    updated_at = now()
column_2 $1::uuid
  column_3 $2
  AND status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'pending', 'confirmed')
  AND payment_status NOT IN ('confirmed')
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id

UPDATE table_3
column_10 'pending',
    updated_at = now()
column_2 $1::uuid
  column_3 $2
  AND status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'confirmed')
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id

  platform_user_id,
  last_image_url,
  last_video_url,

)

  NULLIF($1, ''),
  NULLIF($2, ''),
  NULLIF($3, ''),

  $5,

)
ON CONFLICT (platform_user_id) DO UPDATE column_13 COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_image_url, msq_media_context.last_image_url),

  last_gen_mode = EXCLUDED.last_gen_mode,
  last_gen_prompt = EXCLUDED.last_gen_prompt,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE EXCLUDED.platform_user_id IS NOT NULL;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO table_5 (
    tenant_id, business_id, telegram_id, platform, platform_id,
    hourly_text_count, last_text_hour,
    daily_image_count, daily_voice_count,
    message_count, last_activity_date, last_seen_at,
    first_seen_at, display_name, username
)
VALUES (
    $1, $2, $3, 'telegram', $3::text,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    1, CURRENT_DATE, NOW(),
    NOW(),
    COALESCE($4, 'Customer'),
    COALESCE($5, '')
)
ON CONFLICT (business_id, platform, platform_id)
DO UPDATE column_14 CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_text_hour IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_text_hour < date_trunc('hour', NOW()) 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.hourly_text_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.hourly_text_count
    END,
    last_text_hour = CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN NOW() ELSE msq_customers.last_text_hour END,
    daily_image_count = CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.daily_image_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.daily_image_count
    END,
    daily_voice_count = CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.daily_voice_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.daily_voice_count
    END,
    message_count = msq_customers.message_count + 1,
    last_activity_date = CURRENT_DATE,
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    display_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.display_name, msq_customers.display_name),
    username = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.username, msq_customers.username)
RETURNING
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_text_hour IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_text_hour < date_trunc('hour', NOW()) 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.hourly_text_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 30
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS text_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_image_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 5
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS image_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_voice_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 10
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS voice_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'file' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_image_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 3
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS file_allowed

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Handle Output').first().json;
const raw = data.agent_reply || '';

const clean = raw
  .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/__(.*?)__/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/_(.*?)_/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/~~(.*?)~~/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/`{1,3}(.*?)`{1,3}/gs, '$1')
  .replace(/https?:\/\/\S+/g, '')
  .replace(/🔗\s*/g, '')
  .replace(/\n{2,}/g, '. ')
  .replace(/\n/g, ', ')
  .replace(/[\u{1F000}-\u{1FFFF}]/gu, '')
  .replace(/[\u{2600}-\u{27BF}]/gu, '')
  .replace(/[\u{FE00}-\u{FE0F}]/gu, '')
  .replace(/[\u{1F900}-\u{1FAFF}]/gu, '')
  .replace(/\uFE0F/gu, '')
  .replace(/,\s*\./g, '.')
  .replace(/\.\s*\./g, '.')
  .replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ')
  .trim();

return { json: { 
  voice_text:      clean,
  bot_token:       data.bot_token,
  chat_id:         data.chat_id,
  tenant_id:       data.tenant_id,
  conversation_id: data.conversation_id,
  user_message:    data.user_message,
  is_owner:        data.is_owner,
  response_type:   'voice'
}};

SELECT
  t.telegram_id,
  t.preferred_name,
  t.full_name,
  b.business_name,
  b.business_type,
  b.business_mode,
  b.description AS business_description,
  c.agent_name,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token
FROM table_12 t
LEFT JOIN table_13 b ON b.id = $2::uuid
LEFT JOIN table_26 c ON c.business_id = b.id
JOIN table_6 pi
  ON pi.business_id = b.id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE t.id = $1::uuid

UPDATE table_1
column_1 GREATEST(0, balance - $2),
    updated_at = now()
column_2 $1
  AND $3 = true;

  (tenant_id, action_type, credits_used, metadata)
SELECT $1, $4, $2, $5::jsonb
WHERE $3 = true;

INSERT INTO table_27 
  (conversation_id, tenant_id, role, content, tokens_used, credits_charged, platform)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, 'user',      $3, 0,  0,   'telegram'),
  ($1, $2, 'assistant', $4, $5, $6,  'telegram')

UPDATE table_3
column_10 'dispatched',
    dispatched_at = now()
column_3 $1
  column_5 $2::uuid
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id

UPDATE table_3
column_10 'delivered',
    delivered_at = now(),
    review_requested_at = now()
column_3 $1
RETURNING order_number, customer_chat_id

UPDATE table_3
column_16 $2::int,
    updated_at = now()
column_3 $1
RETURNING order_number, review_rating, customer_chat_id

SELECT DISTINCT ON (pi.id)
  pi.id::text,
  COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name) AS product_name,
  pi.minio_url
FROM table_29 pi
JOIN table_3 co
  ON co.business_id = pi.business_id
  AND co.order_number = $1
JOIN table_30 (
  SELECT elem->>'name' AS item_name
  FROM table_31(co.items::jsonb) AS elem
) items ON
  LOWER(COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name)) ILIKE '%' || LOWER(items.item_name) || '%'
  OR LOWER(items.item_name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER(COALESCE(pi.display_name, pi.product_name)) || '%'
WHERE pi.minio_url IS NOT NULL
  AND pi.image_type = 'product'
LIMIT 5
